nl_query: For each department, show the department name, number of courses, number of faculty members, number of active boards, number of scripts currently in evaluation, and the average marks awarded per script.
failed_sql:
SELECT au.name AS academic_unit_name, COUNT(DISTINCT au.id) AS num_courses, COUNT(DISTINCT fc.employee_id) AS num_faculty_members, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS num_active_boards, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS num_scripts_in_evaluation, AVG(ea.total_marks) AS avg_evaluation_marks_per_script
FROM academic_unit au
JOIN academic_unit_closure ac ON au.id = ac.descendant_id
JOIN faculty_cache fc ON au.id = fc.department_id
JOIN board b ON au.id = b.course_id
JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON b.id = ea.board_id
WHERE au.unit_type = 'COURSE' AND ea.status = 'SUBMITTED'
GROUP BY au.name
ORDER BY avg_evaluation_marks_per_script DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'id'. It exists in multiple tables (evaluation_attempt, academic_unit, board). You must qualify it with a table alias.
